text: Which Microsoft ethical AI principle is aimed at ensuring AI systems treat all people equally?

options.label: A
options.text: Privacy and Security

options.label: B
options.text: Fairness

options.label: C
options.text: Reliability and Safety

options.label: D
options.text: Inclusiveness

text: What can be done during AI development to minimize bias?

options.label: A
options.text: Collect massive amounts of data for training.

options.label: B
options.text: Focus on accuracy of the data.

options.label: C
options.text: Use diverse data, fairness metrics, and human oversight.

options.label: D
options.text: Improve on the computational efficiency and speed.

text: Why is it important to ensure the security of the code used in Generative AI (Gen AI) tools?

options.label: A

options.label: B

options.label: C
options.text: Ensuring code security maintains the integrity of the AI system.

options.label: D
options.text: Ensuring code security supports the development of more advanced AI features.

options.text: Modify the .gitignore file to include the specific files.

options.label: C
options.text: Use the GitHub Copilot settings in the user interface to exclude files.

options.label: D
options.text: Add the specific files to a copilot.ignore file.

text: What is a benefit of using custom models in GitHub Copilot?

options.label: B

options.label: C

text: How can you improve the context used by GitHub Copilot? (Each correct answer presents part of the solution. Choose two.)

options.label: B

options.text: By highlighting the code you want to fix, right-clicking, and selecting "Refactor using GitHub Copilot."

text: What role does chat history play in GitHub Copilot's code suggestions?

options.label: A
options.text: Chat history is used to train the GitHub Copilot model in real-time.

options.label: B

options.text: Chat history is stored and shared with other users to enhance collaboration.

options.label: D
options.text: Chat history is irrelevant to GitHub Copilot and does not affect its functionality.

options.text: 60–90 minutes

options.label: D

text: What is GitHub Copilot primarily designed for?

options.label: A

text: Which of the following is a limitation of GitHub Copilot? Select two choices.

options.label: B

options.label: C

options.label: D

text: Which of the following is a key feature of GitHub Copilot's recent updates?

options.label: B

options.label: C

options.label: D

text: What is used by GitHub Copilot in the IDE to determine the prompt context?

text: What is few-shot prompting?

options.label: C

options.label: B

options.label: B

options.label: B

options.label: C

options.label: D

text: What do you check when GitHub Copilot content exclusions are not working? Each correct answer presents part of the solution. (Choose two.)

options.label: A

options.label: B

options.label: C

options.label: D
options.text: If the user is part of the content exclusion team that limits the use of content exclusions.

text: When can GitHub Copilot still use content that was excluded using content exclusion?

options.label: A

options.label: B

options.label: C
options.text: If the content exclusion was configured at the enterprise level, and is overwritten at the organization level.

options.label: D
